title: The Lord's Prayer (opening)
coptic: Ϫⲉ Ⲡⲉⲛⲓⲱⲧ ⲉⲧϧⲉⲛ ⲛⲓⲫⲏⲟⲩⲓ ⲙⲁⲣⲉϥⲧⲟⲩⲃⲟ ⲛ̀ϫⲉ ⲡⲉⲕⲣⲁⲛ
meaning: Our Father who art in heaven, hallowed be Thy name

title: Trisagion (first verse)
coptic: Ⲁⲅⲓⲟⲥ ⲟ Ⲑⲉⲟⲥ: Ⲁⲅⲓⲟⲥ Ⲓⲥⲭⲩⲣⲟⲥ: Ⲁⲅⲓⲟⲥ Ⲁⲑⲁⲛⲁⲧⲟⲥ
meaning: Holy God, Holy Mighty, Holy Immortal

title: Resurrection hymn (opening)
meaning: Christ is risen from the dead

title: Hail to you, Mary
meaning: Hail to you, Mary, the beautiful dove
